notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio reached on error

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Andruw Monasterio. Colt Keith scores. Jahmai Jones scores. Matt Vierling to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Andruw Monasterio.
